docs.title: Audio Prep Pipeline
docs.text:
Welcome to the Audio Prep Pipeline documentation.

This project converts raw audio recordings into datasets ready for self-supervised speech pretraining such as Wav2Vec2 and XLS-R.

The pipeline performs four major stages:

  1. Audio discovery
  2. Audio conversion
  3. Validation
  4. Manifest generation

The default output is:

  • WAV
  • 16 kHz
  • Mono

which matches the expected input specification of most modern SSL speech models.

docs.title: Pipeline Overview
docs.text: Raw MP3 -> Find audio files -> Convert using FFmpeg -> Validate output-> Generate JSONL manifest -> Ready for pretraining

docs.title: Features
docs.text:
• Multi-process conversion
  • Automatic validation
  • FFmpeg backend
  • JSONL manifest generation
  • Failure recovery
  • Modular Python API
  • CLI interface
  • Unit tested\
